# OSS Labs
> A community of engineers building open source developer tools and infrastructure. Working in the open, together.

## Site
- Home: https://ossl.dev
- Projects: https://ossl.dev/projects/
- About: https://ossl.dev/about/
- Blog: https://ossl.dev/blog/

## Projects
- genesis (TypeScript): https://github.com/Open-Vanguard/genesis — Declarative, cross-platform developer environment provisioning engine.
- zinc (Rust, 62 stars): https://zinc.ossl.dev — Universal Shared Memory. Fast, cross-language memory sharing.
- pylon (TypeScript): https://github.com/Open-Vanguard/pylon — Dead simple API versioning.

## Community
- GitHub: https://github.com/Open-Vanguard

## For LLMs
- Full documentation: https://ossl.dev/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://ossl.dev/sitemap.xml
